requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Eswatini's EV market is nascent, but infrastructure is likely to follow Southern African and South-African IEC practice because Eswatini is a landlocked SADC / SACU market and imports power from South Africa. Exporters should therefore treat IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 for DC fast charging as the practical compatibility baseline unless an Eswatini project owner, EEC, ESERA, or tender specification states otherwise.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼电动汽车市场仍处早期，但由于其为内陆SADC / SACU市场并从南非进口电力，充电基础设施很可能沿用南部非洲及南非IEC实践。因此，除非埃斯瓦蒂尼项目业主、EEC、ESERA或招标规范另有规定，出口商应将IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流充电和IEC 62196-3 CCS2直流快充视为实务兼容基线。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼電動汽車市場仍處早期，但由於其為內陸SADC / SACU市場並從南非進口電力，充電基礎設施很可能沿用南部非洲及南非IEC實務。因此，除非埃斯瓦蒂尼項目業主、EEC、ESERA或招標規範另有規定，出口商應將IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流充電和IEC 62196-3 CCS2直流快充視為實務兼容基線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Type 2 AC connector dimensional compatibility
IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / configuration FF DC connector dimensional compatibility
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging general requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. These are not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2. GB/T AC uses different connector gender and signaling assumptions, while GB/T DC uses a different geometry and GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 / IEC communication stack used in IEC-based deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。二者均不能与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2直接插接兼容。GB/T交流接口在接口性别和信号假设上不同，GB/T直流接口则采用不同几何形状和GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非IEC体系部署所用的CCS2 / IEC通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。二者均不能與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2直接插接兼容。GB/T交流接口在接口性別和信號假設上不同，GB/T直流接口則採用不同幾何形狀和GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非IEC體系部署所用的CCS2 / IEC通訊棧。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for likely Eswatini Type 2 / CCS2 deployments. Conversion requires coupler and cable redesign, lock and temperature-rise evidence, control-pilot and proximity-pilot implementation, DC communication-stack replacement where CCS2 is required, labels, spare parts, and IEC test evidence. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于埃斯瓦蒂尼可能采用的Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要重新设计耦合器和电缆、提供锁止及温升证据、实现控制导引和接近导引、在要求CCS2时替换直流通信栈、更新标签和备件，并提供IEC测试证据。不应将转接器视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於埃斯瓦蒂尼可能採用的Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要重新設計耦合器和電纜、提供鎖止及溫升證據、實現控制導引和接近導引、在要求CCS2時替換直流通訊棧、更新標籤和備件，並提供IEC測試證據。不應將轉接器視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but practically critical — Type 2 / CCS2 becomes mandatory where required by the Eswatini project specification, EEC-connected site design, charge-point operator, or imported vehicle fleet compatibility plan
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector compatibility is a hardware and protocol issue. For Eswatini projects likely aligned with Southern African IEC practice, confirm Type 2 / CCS2 requirements before quoting or shipping; GB/T connectors cannot be treated as compatible substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口兼容是硬件和协议问题。对于很可能沿用南部非洲IEC实践的埃斯瓦蒂尼项目，应在报价或发货前确认Type 2 / CCS2要求；GB/T接口不能视为兼容替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口兼容是硬體和協議問題。對於很可能沿用南部非洲IEC實務的埃斯瓦蒂尼項目，應在報價或發貨前確認Type 2 / CCS2要求；GB/T接口不能視為兼容替代。
